description: Implement LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT as roadmap item 11. Create governance/ledger_router_contract.md to define routing logic, writer permissions, and next actor selection governance based on current ledger state and task progression requirements.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap progression from completed item 10 (UNIVERSAL EXECUTOR/AUDITOR EXCHANGE LEDGER LOOP) to next required item 11 (LEDGER ROUTER + LEDGER WRITER + NEXT ACTOR GOVERNANCE CONTRACT)
